title: Company Management
subtitle: Manage system companies

table.noDataDescription: Create a new company to get started.

delete.title: Confirm deletion
delete.message: Are you sure you want to delete this company?
delete.error: Error deleting company. Please try again.

welcome.title: Basic Information
welcome.description: In this tab you can view and edit the main company data: business name, address, document and system configuration.

basicInfo.title: Company data
basicInfo.description: Business name, trade name, physical address and active status of the company.

systemConfig.title: System configuration
systemConfig.description: Document type and number, integration code and whether the company is a Temporary Service (EST).

welcome.title: Attendance Parameters
welcome.description: Configure tolerances, schedules and automatic settings that apply to attendance for this company.

tolerances.title: Tolerances
tolerances.description: Late arrival and lunch break tolerance. Define the minutes allowed before marking tardiness.

scheduleConfig.title: Schedule configuration
scheduleConfig.description: Minutes before and after schedule when marking is allowed, and marking association window.

automaticConfig.title: Automatic configurations
automaticConfig.description: Automatic marking, close without assigned shift and fallback window for associating marks.

welcome.title: System Parameters
welcome.description: Configure marking and system notifications for this company.

markingConfig.title: Marking configuration
markingConfig.description: Enable signature, photo, additional marks and mobile consult menu for markings.

supervisorNotif.title: Supervisor notifications
supervisorNotif.description: Notifications for late arrivals, breaks and departures sent to the manager.

systemNotif.title: System notifications
systemNotif.description: Weekly, daily emails, welcome and status notifications to administrators and employees.

welcome.title: Overtime
welcome.description: Configure calculation type (by period or by day) and active or inactive configurations.

overtimeType.title: Configuration type
overtimeType.description: By period: percentage by time range. By day: percentage applied all day.

overtimeSubtabs.title: Active / Inactive
overtimeSubtabs.description: Active or finished configurations. Inactive ones have an end date.

overtimeTable.title: Configurations table
overtimeTable.description: List of overtime configurations with day, schedule and applied percentage.

overtimeAdd.title: Add configuration
overtimeAdd.description: Create new overtime configurations for specific days or time ranges.

welcome.title: Notifications
welcome.description: Manage company notifications from predefined templates.

notificationsAdd.title: Add notification
notificationsAdd.description: Select a notification template to add and configure for this company.

notificationsTable.title: Notifications table
notificationsTable.description: List of configured notifications. You can edit or delete each one.

welcome.title: Marking Rules
welcome.description: Define entry/exit rules with Global or Geofence mode for this company.

rulesExplanation.title: Explanation
rulesExplanation.description: Rules can require mark in authorized geofence (entry) or allow global exit according to employee configuration.

rulesNew.title: New rule
rulesNew.description: Create rules combining mark type (entry/exit) and mode (Geofence/Global).

rulesTable.title: Rules table
rulesTable.description: List of configured rules. You can delete existing rules.

welcome.title: Welcome to the Companies module
welcome.description: In this module you can manage system companies. This guide will show you the main features available.

toolbar.title: Main actions
toolbar.description: Here you can add companies individually, perform bulk upload from Excel, or download the list in Excel format.

table.title: Companies table
table.description: The table displays all registered companies. You can sort by clicking on column headers. Use the edit or delete buttons to manage each company.

pagination.title: Pagination
pagination.description: Use these controls to navigate between pages and adjust the number of records displayed.

transitoryService.label: Temporary Service Company (EST)
transitoryService.description: Check if the company provides temporary services

createSuccess.title: Company created successfully
createSuccess.description: The company has been created correctly

updateSuccess.title: Company updated successfully
updateSuccess.description: The company has been updated correctly

createError.title: Error creating company
createError.description: An error occurred while creating the company

updateError.title: Error updating company
updateError.description: An error occurred while updating the company

excel.title: Instructions:
excel.step1: Download the Excel template to see the required format
excel.step2: Fill in the company information in the template
excel.step4: Verify the information and press Process

manual.title: Instructions for manual entry:
manual.step1: Click Add Row to add a new company
manual.step2: Fill in the required fields in each row
manual.step3: You can add as many rows as needed
manual.step4: Verify the information and press Process

table.noDataDescription: Add companies manually or upload an Excel file

validation.validationErrorDescription: Cannot process: There are invalid document numbers. Please fix the errors before continuing.
validation.noCompaniesWarningDescription: No companies to process. Add at least one company.

documentType.error: Please select a valid document type

processCompletedWithErrors.title: Process completed with errors
processCompletedWithErrors.description: Review the table for more details.

ALERT_2_CONSECUTIVE_ABSENCES.name: Alert for 2 consecutive absences
ALERT_2_CONSECUTIVE_ABSENCES.description: Notifies when an employee has 2 consecutive absences

ALERT_3_CONSECUTIVE_DAYS_IN_MONTH.name: Alert for 3 consecutive days in the month
ALERT_3_CONSECUTIVE_DAYS_IN_MONTH.description: Notifies when an employee has 3 consecutive days in the month

ALERT_2_MONDAYS_IN_MONTH.name: Alert for 2 Mondays in the month
ALERT_2_MONDAYS_IN_MONTH.description: Notifies when an employee has 2 Mondays in the month

businessNameDescription: Legal name of the company registered with authorities
tradeNameDescription: Name by which the company is commercially known
addressDescription: Main physical location of the company
documentNumberDescription: Fiscal identification number of the company
integrationCodeDescription: Code for integration with other systems
isActiveDescription: Activate or deactivate the company in the system
transitoryServiceDescription: Mark if the company provides transitory services
lateArrivalToleranceDescription: Minutes allowed for late arrival before marking tardiness
lateArrivalToleranceImportant: Important: If the entry time is 09:00 and the tolerance is 10 minutes, a mark at 09:08 will be considered on time, but a mark at 09:11 will be considered tardiness.
lunchBreakToleranceDescription: Additional minutes allowed for lunch time
lunchBreakToleranceImportant: Important: If lunch time is from 13:00 to 14:00 and the tolerance is 15 minutes, a return at 14:13 will be considered on time, but at 14:16 it will be tardiness.
minutesBeforeScheduleDescription: Time allowed to mark before shift start
minutesBeforeScheduleNote: Note: If the schedule is 09:00 and 30 minutes before are allowed, a mark from 08:30 will be valid, but a mark at 08:29 will not be recorded.
minutesAfterScheduleDescription: Maximum time allowed to mark after schedule
minutesAfterScheduleNote: Note: If the exit time is 18:00 and 60 minutes after are allowed, a mark until 19:00 will be valid, but after 19:00 it will not be recorded.
fallbackScheduleWindowHoursDescription: Number of hours extended before shift start and after shift end. Used to determine which assistance day each mark belongs to according to each day's schedule, so the system can align marks correctly.
fallbackScheduleWindowHoursNote: With this value the system determines which assistance day the mark is associated with (e.g. night shift ending at 06:00 and mark at 08:00; or mark on a day off relative to the previous day's shift). Helps define the ranges to align marks.
companyTimezoneDescription: Sets the company's local calendar for validating schedule assignment and deletion (what counts as “today”). Must be a valid IANA identifier.
automaticCheckInMinutesDescription: Time for the system to automatically mark entry
automaticCheckInMinutesWarning: If configured to 30 minutes, marks are automatically recorded if they are within ±30 minutes of each scheduled time (entry, lunch, exit, etc.).
minutesCloseRecordWithoutShiftDescriptio: Time to close records of employees without assigned shift
minutesCloseRecordWithoutShiftWarning: Warning: If there's no assigned schedule and the parameter is 480 minutes, when marking at 09:00 hrs, exit can only be marked until 17:00 hrs; after that it won't be allowed.
enableSignatureOnCheckInDescription: Requires digital signature when recording attendance
showMobileConsultMenuDescription: Enables consultations in the mobile application
enableLateBreakStartEmailToManager: Late Break Start Email to Manager
enableLateBreakStartEmailToManagerDescri: Notifies worker about late lunch break start
enableLateBreakEndEmailToManager: Late Break End Email to Manager
enableLateBreakEndEmailToManagerDescript: Notifies worker about late lunch break return
enableWeeklyEmailToEmployeeDescription: Sends weekly attendance summary to employee
enableWeeklyEmailToAdminDescription: Sends weekly attendance summary to administrator
enableDailyEmailToAdminDescription: Sends daily attendance summary to administrator
enableWelcomeEmailDescription: Sends welcome email to new employees
enableAdminStatusEmailOnCheckIn: Enable Admin Status Email on Check-in
antecipatedOvertimeDescription: Allows recording overtime before it is automatically generated
breakOvertimeDescription: Allows recording overtime during break or lunch periods

modal.dayOfWeekRequired: Select a day of the week
modal.startTimeValidation: Start time must be less than end time
modal.endTimeValidation: End time must be greater than start time
modal.percentageMin: Percentage must be greater than or equal to 0
modal.percentageMax: Percentage must be less than or equal to 300

toast.updateSuccessDescription: The overtime configuration has been updated successfully.
toast.createSuccessDescription: The overtime configuration has been created successfully.

deleteModal.title: Delete configuration
deleteModal.deleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this configuration? This action cannot be undone.
deleteModal.finishMessage: Are you sure you want to finish this configuration? The end date will be set to yesterday.

toast.deleteSuccessDescription: The configuration has been deleted successfully.
toast.finishSuccessDescription: The configuration has been finished successfully. The end date was set to yesterday.

notificationToManagerDescription: Will be sent to direct managers
notificationUpdateSuccessDescription: The notification has been updated correctly
notificationUpdateErrorDescription: An error occurred while updating the notification
notificationCreateSuccessDescription: The notification has been created correctly
notificationCreateErrorDescription: An error occurred while creating the notification
notificationDeleteSuccessDescription: The notification has been deleted correctly
notificationDeleteErrorDescription: An error occurred while deleting the notification
notificationDeleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this notification?
updateSuccessDescription: The company has been updated correctly
updateErrorDescription: An error occurred while updating the company

attendanceRules.description: Configure combined attendance rules (check-in/check-out with Global or Geofence mode) for this company.

explanation.geofenceEntry: If you configure Check-in in Authorized Georeference Mark mode, the rule requires that the check-in mark always be made from an authorized marking point: those configured in branches as geolocation of type check-in. If the employee tries to mark from anywhere else, the system will not allow it, because at company level the configuration requires marking within an authorized zone.
explanation.globalExit: If you configure Check-out in Global mode, the employee will use their own configurations to mark check-out; they may mark from wherever their configuration allows.

modal.title: New attendance rule
modal.description: Define the mark type and mode for this rule.
modal.levelFixed: In this version the level is always Company.

deleteModal.title: Delete rule
deleteModal.description: You are about to delete the attendance rule shown below.
deleteModal.subtitle: This action cannot be undone.

toast.createSuccessDescription: The attendance rule was created successfully.
toast.createErrorDescription: Could not create the rule. Check that a rule for the same mark type does not already exist.
toast.deleteSuccessDescription: The attendance rule was removed successfully.
